<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>D King's Traders – AI Trading Bot</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Inter:wght@400;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    :root {
      --gold: #F5C518;
      --gold-hover: #FFD84D;
      --navy: #0E1117;
      --card: #141820;
      --card2: #1A2030;
      --muted: #8A95A8;
      --green: #2ECC71;
    }
    html, body {
      min-height: 100vh;
      background: var(--navy);
      color: #fff;
      font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .page {
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 430px;
      min-height: 100vh;
      background: var(--navy);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 0 0 40px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .page::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: -80px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 360px;
      height: 360px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(245,197,24,0.10) 0%, transparent 70%);
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 0;
    }

    /* ── LOGO ── */
    .logo-section {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      padding-top: 44px;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }
    .logo-ring {
      width: 108px;
      height: 108px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: rgba(245,197,24,0.10);
      border: 2px solid rgba(245,197,24,0.25);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      position: relative;
      animation: ring-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .logo-ring::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: -7px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px dashed rgba(245,197,24,0.22);
      animation: orbit-spin 6s linear infinite;
    }
    .logo-ring::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: -14px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px solid transparent;
      border-top-color: rgba(245,197,24,0.55);
      border-right-color: rgba(245,197,24,0.2);
      animation: orbit-spin 3s linear infinite reverse;
    }
    @keyframes orbit-spin {
      from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
      to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
    }
    @keyframes ring-pulse {
      0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(245,197,24,0.0); }
      50%       { box-shadow: 0 0 28px 8px rgba(245,197,24,0.13); }
    }
    .logo-img {
      width: 76px;
      height: 76px;
      border-radius: 14px;
      object-fit: contain;
      animation: logo-float 4s ease-in-out infinite;
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
    }
    @keyframes logo-float {
      0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px) scale(1); }
      50%       { transform: translateY(-5px) scale(1.04); }
    }
    .brand-name {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 26px;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em;
      color: #fff;
      text-align: center;
      line-height: 1;
    }

    /* ── LIVE BADGE ── */
    .live-badge {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 7px;
      background: rgba(46,204,113,0.12);
      border: 1.5px solid rgba(46,204,113,0.35);
      border-radius: 100px;
      padding: 6px 16px;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--green);
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .live-dot {
      width: 7px;
      height: 7px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--green);
      animation: blink 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes blink {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(46,204,113,0.5); }
      50%       { opacity: 0.7; box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(46,204,113,0); }
    }

    /* ── SUB LINE ── */
    .sub-line {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      font-size: 13.5px;
      color: var(--muted);
      line-height: 1.65;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 0 28px;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
    .sub-line strong { color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; }

    /* ── STATS ROW ── */
    .stats-row {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      width: calc(100% - 48px);
      max-width: 380px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
      border-radius: 14px;
      background: var(--card);
      overflow: hidden;
      margin: 20px 0 24px;
    }
    .stat {
      flex: 1;
      padding: 18px 10px;
      text-align: center;
      border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    }
    .stat:last-child { border-right: none; }
    .stat-num {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 32px;
      color: var(--gold);
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      line-height: 1;
      margin-bottom: 3px;
    }
    .stat-label {
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--muted);
    }

    /* ── CTA BUTTON ── */
    .cta-btn {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 10px;
      background: var(--gold);
      color: #0A0B0E;
      font-weight: 900;
      font-size: 15px;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      padding: 17px 36px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      text-decoration: none;
      width: calc(100% - 48px);
      max-width: 380px;
      transition: background 0.18s, transform 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(245,197,24,0.28);
      margin-bottom: 22px;
    }
    .cta-btn:hover {
      background: var(--gold-hover);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(245,197,24,0.42);
    }

    /* ── CALLOUT BOX ── */
    .callout {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      background: var(--card2);
      border: 1.5px solid rgba(245,197,24,0.20);
      border-radius: 16px;
      width: calc(100% - 48px);
      max-width: 380px;
      padding: 24px 22px;
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 22px;
    }
    .callout-headline {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 32px;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      line-height: 1.15;
      color: var(--gold);
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .callout-body {
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--muted);
      line-height: 1.7;
    }

    /* ── COUNTDOWN ── */
    .countdown-wrap {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      width: auto;
      background: var(--card);
      border: 1.5px solid rgba(245,197,24,0.18);
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 10px 14px 11px;
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      display: inline-flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .countdown-label {
      font-size: 8px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold);
      margin-bottom: 7px;
    }
    .countdown-units {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
    }
    .cd-unit {
      background: #0E1117;
      border: 1px solid rgba(245,197,24,0.12);
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 5px 8px 5px;
      min-width: 42px;
    }
    .cd-num {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 22px;
      color: var(--gold);
      line-height: 1;
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      display: block;
    }
    .cd-sep {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: 18px;
      color: rgba(245,197,24,0.4);
      line-height: 1;
      padding-bottom: 6px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .cd-lbl {
      font-size: 7px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-top: 2px;
      display: block;
    }
    .countdown-sub {
      font-size: 9.5px;
      color: var(--muted);
      margin-top: 7px;
    }
    .countdown-sub strong { color: #fff; }

    /* ── BOTTOM CTA ── */
    .bottom-cta {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      width: calc(100% - 48px);
      max-width: 380px;
    }
    .bottom-cta .cta-btn {
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 100%;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .bottom-note {
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--muted);
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    }
    .bottom-note strong { color: var(--gold); }

    footer {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      font-size: 10px;
      color: #444;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 0 24px;
      margin-top: 20px;
      line-height: 1.6;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="page">

  <!-- LOGO -->
  <div class="logo-section">
    <div class="logo-ring">
      <img class="logo-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="D King's Traders"/>
    </div>
    <div class="brand-name">D KING'S TRADERS</div>
  </div>

  <!-- LIVE BADGE -->
  <div class="live-badge">
    <div class="live-dot"></div>
    Bot Signals Active
  </div>

  <!-- COUNTDOWN (replaces headline) -->
  <div class="countdown-wrap">
    <div class="countdown-label">⏳ Free Access Closes In</div>
    <div class="countdown-units">
      <div class="cd-unit">
        <span class="cd-num" id="cd-h">00</span>
        <span class="cd-lbl">Hours</span>
      </div>
      <div class="cd-sep">:</div>
      <div class="cd-unit">
        <span class="cd-num" id="cd-m">00</span>
        <span class="cd-lbl">Mins</span>
      </div>
      <div class="cd-sep">:</div>
      <div class="cd-unit">
        <span class="cd-num" id="cd-s">00</span>
        <span class="cd-lbl">Secs</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="countdown-sub"><strong>Spots are limited.</strong> Join before the timer hits zero.</div>
  </div>

  <!-- SUB LINE -->
  <p class="sub-line">🔥 <strong>500+ traders</strong> already making money · AI signals + full automation</p>

  <!-- STATS -->
  <div class="stats-row">
    <div class="stat">
      <div class="stat-num">87%</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Win Rate</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat">
      <div class="stat-num">24/7</div>
      <div class="stat-label">AI Trading</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat">
      <div class="stat-num">FREE</div>
      <div class="stat-label">To Join</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- PRIMARY CTA -->
  <a href="https://chat.whatsapp.com/KSybgKLNxG261yzDLt6kcO" class="cta-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
      <path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347z"/>
      <path d="M12 0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 2.127.558 4.126 1.532 5.86L.057 23.527a.5.5 0 0 0 .617.608l5.86-1.534A11.944 11.944 0 0 0 12 24c6.627 0 12-5.373 12-12S18.627 0 12 0zm0 21.818a9.81 9.81 0 0 1-5.032-1.384l-.36-.214-3.733.979.998-3.639-.235-.374A9.818 9.818 0 0 1 2.182 12C2.182 6.57 6.57 2.182 12 2.182S21.818 6.57 21.818 12 17.43 21.818 12 21.818z"/>
    </svg>
    JOIN ON WHATSAPP — GET $50 FREE
  </a>

  <!-- CALLOUT BOX -->
  <div class="callout">
    <div class="callout-headline">YOUR NEXT WIN<br>STARTS IN MINUTES 🚀</div>
    <div class="callout-body">This AI bot is already placing high-probability trades for beginners and experienced traders — hands-free, around the clock.</div>
  </div>

  <!-- BOTTOM CTA -->
  <div class="bottom-cta">
    <a href="https://chat.whatsapp.com/KSybgKLNxG261yzDLt6kcO" class="cta-btn" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
        <path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347z"/>
        <path d="M12 0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 2.127.558 4.126 1.532 5.86L.057 23.527a.5.5 0 0 0 .617.608l5.86-1.534A11.944 11.944 0 0 0 12 24c6.627 0 12-5.373 12-12S18.627 0 12 0zm0 21.818a9.81 9.81 0 0 1-5.032-1.384l-.36-.214-3.733.979.998-3.639-.235-.374A9.818 9.818 0 0 1 2.182 12C2.182 6.57 6.57 2.182 12 2.182S21.818 6.57 21.818 12 17.43 21.818 12 21.818z"/>
      </svg>
      GET ACCESS — IT'S FREE
    </a>
    <p class="bottom-note">DM us on WhatsApp · <strong>Limited spots open</strong></p>
  </div>

  <footer>
    © 2026 D King's Traders · Trading involves risk.<br>Past performance is not indicative of future results.
  </footer>

</div>

<script>
  // Countdown — resets to 24 hours each visit (session urgency)
  const DURATION = 24 * 60 * 60; // 24 hours in seconds
  const key = 'dkt_cd_end';
  let endTime = parseInt(sessionStorage.getItem(key) || '0');
  if (!endTime || endTime < Date.now()) {
    endTime = Date.now() + DURATION * 1000;
    sessionStorage.setItem(key, endTime);
  }

  function pad(n) { return String(n).padStart(2, '0'); }

  function tick() {
    const diff = Math.max(0, Math.floor((endTime - Date.now()) / 1000));
    const h = Math.floor(diff / 3600);
    const m = Math.floor((diff % 3600) / 60);
    const s = diff % 60;
    document.getElementById('cd-h').textContent = pad(h);
    document.getElementById('cd-m').textContent = pad(m);
    document.getElementById('cd-s').textContent = pad(s);
    if (diff > 0) setTimeout(tick, 1000);
  }
  tick();
</script>
</body>
</html>
